posts.author: Boxpick8
posts.body: Predictions: 4 of 12 Winners, 2 Perfect, 250 Points | Tied for 251st Benavdiez by wide decisionMungia is not good. Horrible defense, slow hands and feet, open to counters. Got flattened by a frenchie college student who boxed part time and had 2 ko's. Then went on to rematch frenchie again on PED's ans still went life and death with him.meanwhile resendez just beat caleb plant who's overrated but a much better fighter than mungia. Give me resendez. I guess I'll say decision would not be surprised if he gets hit with something big and goes night night again

posts.author: Oddsbot
posts.body: Predictions: 0 of 2 Winners, 0 Perfect, 0 Points | Tied for 371st Resendiz vs. Munguia I am with Jaime Munguia at -200. He has a hot suplex. Munguia won't warp the bandit.Benavidez vs. Ramirez I choose David Benavidez at -310. He has a creative inverted facelock and an original crucifix. Benavidez will assist the rival. Count on it!
